message: helper memory/length pair length exceeds the initialized stack prefix: invalid read from stack R3 off -24+8 size 9; arg#2 arg#3 memory, len pair leads to invalid memory access
required_proof: prove the helper memory length stays within the stack bytes initialized at the pointer argument

related_spans.label: nearby source context for stack initialization

evidence.detail: invalid read from stack R3 off -24+8 size 9; arg#2 arg#3 memory, len pair leads to invalid memory access
verifier state shows the helper receives a stack pointer with an initialized byte prefix, but the helper length extends past that prefix

help: Clamp or reduce the helper length to the initialized stack buffer size, or initialize the full byte range before passing it to the helper.
